headline: American Airlines dips after carrier rebuffs United merger approach
summary: Investing.com -- American Airlines shares slipped in premarket trading Monday after the carrier said it had no interest in merging with United Airlines and had not held any such discussions, deflating prospects of a deal that would have ranked as the biggest airline consolidation in more than a decade.

content.title: American Airlines dips after carrier rebuffs United merger approach
content.summary: Investing.com -- American Airlines shares slipped in premarket trading Monday after the carrier said it had no interest in merging with United Airlines and had not held any such discussions, deflating prospects of a deal that would have ranked as the biggest airline consolidation in more than a decade.

headline: Airlines Cut Capacity As Much As 3% Amid Jet Fuel Surge
summary: Global carriers cancel flights and trim routes as fuel costs spike, with KLM scrapping 80 return flights and Delta facing $2.5 billion in added expenses.

content.title: Airlines Cut Capacity As Much As 3% Amid Jet Fuel Surge
content.summary: Global carriers cancel flights and trim routes as fuel costs spike, with KLM scrapping 80 return flights and Delta facing $2.5 billion in added expenses.

headline: American Airlines, United, Delta, Suffer Amid Fuel Fears, Flight Delays. What to Know Ahead of Earnings.
summary: American Airlines  stock fell 3% ahead of the open as investors took on board the carrier’s abrupt rejection of  United Airlines  ’ merger pitch.  Airlines and cruise operators have been among the most volatile stocks during the conflict—with surging jet fuel prices a big threat to earnings.  More than 1,200 Southwest Airlines flights were delayed Sunday, 29% of its schedule, according to flight-tracker FlightAware.

content.title: American Airlines, United, Delta, Suffer Amid Fuel Fears, Flight Delays. What to Know Ahead of Earnings.
content.summary: American Airlines  stock fell 3% ahead of the open as investors took on board the carrier’s abrupt rejection of  United Airlines  ’ merger pitch.  Airlines and cruise operators have been among the most volatile stocks during the conflict—with surging jet fuel prices a big threat to earnings.  More than 1,200 Southwest Airlines flights were delayed Sunday, 29% of its schedule, according to flight-tracker FlightAware.

headline: Bipartisan Senators Warn United and American Airlines on Potential Merger
summary: Though American has rejected a deal, lawmakers ask both carriers to share how it could affect routes and fares.

headline: American Airlines Stock Falls After Snubbing United Merger. That’s Not the Only Reason.
summary: American Airlines  stock fell more than 5% early Monday as investors took on board the carrier’s abrupt rejection of  United Airlines  ’ merger pitch.  Airlines and cruise operators have been among the most volatile stocks during the conflict—with surging jet fuel prices a big threat to earnings.  More than 1,200 Southwest Airlines flights were delayed Sunday, 29% of its schedule, according to flight-tracker FlightAware.

content.title: American Airlines Stock Falls After Snubbing United Merger. That’s Not the Only Reason.

Airlines and cruise operators have been among the most volatile stocks during the conflict—with surging jet fuel prices a big threat to earnings.  More than 1,200 Southwest Airlines flights were delayed Sunday, 29% of its schedule, according to flight-tracker FlightAware.

headline: United Q1 earnings preview: Crude surge, premium push, and merger chatter are on the agenda

headline: United Q1 earnings top estimates as premium business partly offsets fuel price surge
summary: United Airlines reported first quarter earnings after the bell that topped estimates on Tuesday, with its premium business partly blunting the effect of surging fuel costs.
